purpose: Create two 10-page reports: one describing the previous Workflow Pro iteration achievements, and one planning the next 30-point Graph Brain implementation phase.

skillsUsed.name: web-design-engineer
skillsUsed.role: Build polished browser-readable HTML reports with a NEXUS-compatible dark technical interface.

skillsUsed.name: gpt-image-2
skillsUsed.role: Generate two report visuals for Workflow Pro achievement mapping and Graph Brain 30-point architecture.

reports.title: Workflow Pro Previous Iteration Achievement Report

nextThirtyPointPlan.target: Let the Graph Brain plan workflow node paths from user requirements, generate valid workflow JSON, append a new workflow group onto the canvas, and explain unavailable capabilities.

recommendedArchitecture.responsibility: Understand the user's natural-language workflow goal, infer required topology, detect missing node capabilities, and produce an implementation brief.
Convert the implementation brief into strict nexus.workflow.v1 JSON that can be pasted into the product and appended to the canvas as a new group.

scoreBreakdown.label: Brain can understand the user's workflow goal and produce a topology plan.
Brain can produce valid workflow JSON through a compiler stage.
Computer-use screen test proves paste/import/append succeeds without revealing test answers to the Brain.

verification.imageGeneration: Two GPT Image 2 PNG assets were generated and embedded in the HTML reports.
